steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models branch from main and set up the worktree.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify there are no dependencies to satisfy (task has an empty dependency list).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create the mandatory task folder structure, including assets/paper/ and assets/answer/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review existing papers in the corpus (expected to be empty; skipped if so).

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Search the internet for compartmental DSGC modelling papers and patch-clamp studies across the 5 research questions.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review prior task outputs (expected to be empty since t0002 is the first research task).

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Produce plan/plan.md covering paper selection strategy, answer-asset structure, and verification criteria.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Download and summarize ~20 paper assets across the 5 RQs, then write the synthesis answer asset.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped - no remote compute required for a literature survey.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped - no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped - this task is a structured survey, not an exploratory analysis task.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json, and remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped - a pure literature survey does not produce comparable performance metrics.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions for downstream tasks based on the survey findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture session transcripts, set task status to completed.
